home.title: Databricks / Data & AI

home.intro: Northern Analytics bridges the gap between strategy and execution. We bring world-class North American data consulting and powerful location intelligence products directly to the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
home.servicesIntro: Executing world-class architectures and advanced data strategies to accelerate your digital transformation.

home.strategyText: We connect advisory, delivery, and measurable value so every data initiative has a clear business outcome.
home.databricksText: From architecture to migration and enablement, our consultants help teams adopt Databricks with secure, scalable patterns.
home.aboutText: Northern Analytics combines North American delivery standards with deep regional commitment in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
home.locatorText: A location intelligence platform for market planning, site selection, territory design, and data-driven expansion.
home.visionText: To be the trusted bridge between advanced data capabilities and practical transformation across the region.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Accelerate Your Digital Transformation?
home.ctaText: Whether you need advanced Databricks architecture or powerful spatial intelligence with S-Locator, our experts are ready to serve the KSA market.

about.title: The Bridge to Digital Maturity
about.intro: Northern Analytics is a specialized consultancy and advisory that translates top-tier North American expertise into the heart of the Saudi Arabia digital transformation.
about.missionText: Deliver practical data, AI, and analytics programs that convert strategy into measurable execution.
about.visionText: Become the trusted regional partner for modern data platforms, spatial intelligence, and digital maturity.
about.leadershipText: We lead with clarity, partnership, and accountable delivery from discovery through measurable outcomes.
about.engagementText: Every engagement starts with business goals, then moves through architecture, delivery, enablement, and continuous improvement.

aboutPage.welcomeBody: Building stronger communities begins with a foundation of robust data, analytics, and AI. At Northern Analytics, we are at the forefront of resilient and sustainable planning, designing, and implementing cutting-edge data-driven and AI-powered technologies to address the challenges posed by a rapidly evolving world. Our innovative solutions in Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, and BI are reshaping the future of IT business model architecture, engineering, and intelligent decision-making.
aboutPage.heroIntro: Northern Analytics is a specialized consultancy and advisory that translates top-tier North American expertise into the heart of the Saudi Arabia digital transformation.
aboutPage.visionText: To serve as the strategic bridge between C-Suite ambition and operational excellence. Accelerating Vision 2030 by transferring top-tier North American expertise directly to the Kingdom's digital economy.
aboutPage.missionText: We unlock the true potential of data and AI by building scalable, secure and resilient foundations. Our mission is to move beyond theory to real-world execution, operationalizing data and AI to drive measurable growth and long-term value.
aboutPage.valuesIntro: We bridge the gap between strategic management and operational execution

values.title: Global Standards, Local Context
values.text: By integrating North American architectural excellence with deep local insights, we provide the strategic roadmap necessary to achieve Saudi Vision 2030 objectives in the digital era.

values.title: Execution Focus
values.text: We are builders, not just strategists. Our value lies in our ability to execute and deliver data and AI operating models and infrastructure.

values.title: Vendor-Agnostic Advisors
values.text: We empower leadership to cut through market noise and identify the vendors that best serve their long-term vision. Our unbiased advisory ensures your architectural foundations are scalable, secure, and performant, maximizing the ROI of your data and AI investments.

aboutPage.storiesIntro: Real results from our global engagements.

stories.title: Redefining Data and AI Strategy
stories.result: Moved the bank up 2 tiers in data and AI maturity.

aboutPage.leadershipHeading: We combine world-class insights with local mastery and execute end-to-end strategies that transform complex challenges into meaningful, sustainable growth.
